data.name: Hentai Nureta Puzzle Power Girls
data.detailed_description:
Can you imagine what Power Girls Puzzle are hiding?



Hentai Nureta Puzzle is an extremely relaxing game.
Listen to music and arrange pictures with cute girls in cool situations.
The puzzle is extremely simple for you to enjoy the relaxation.


Simply choose a girl in a main menu and hit Play Game button. You will have 2 pictures to assemble.
When you assemble pictures for all 5 girls you will unlock additional 2 pictures.
It's a nice surprise and you will love it :)
data.about_the_game:
Can you imagine what Power Girls Puzzle are hiding?



Hentai Nureta Puzzle is an extremely relaxing game.

It's a nice surprise and you will love it :)
data.short_description: Relaxing game with nice music, puzzle, and beautiful anime girls. Discover all the pictures and find out what they hide ?!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows
  • 處理器: Intel Core 2 Dual or AMD Equivalent
  • 記憶體: 1 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 Compatible Graphics Card
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 80 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows
  • 處理器: Intel Core 2 Dual or AMD Equivalent
  • 記憶體: 2 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 Compatible Graphics Card
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 80 MB 可用空間
